race.comment: STENO (7) is smart mare who has been racing well against the boys, coming from the outside barrier to miss by a nose two back before getting within 2.3m of top miler Hi Manameisjeff last week. She looks well placed against her own sex. GUNNA RELOAD (5) has carried on her winning form from last campaign by taking out both a heat and the final of the Riverina Championships since a spell to make it five on the trot. Closed out her three-year-old season with a Group 1 Breeders Challenge win at this circuit and distance and is unbeaten in three third-up attempts. LUX AETERNA (3) backs up after finding winning form at Bathurst on Wednesday. She owns a terrific strike rate at the Menangle mile and should get her chance from the low draw. THE ANSWER (2) draws well and is suited against the girls but did beat the males when winning at this circuit and distance three back. SUGAR PIE HONEY (10) led and faded fresh but owns a strong second-up record so could be a big improver despite a wide draw.
